exampleSentences: Anh ngủ đến bảy rưỡi sáng mới dậy đi làm.
Chị uống một lít rưỡi nước mỗi ngày để khỏe mạnh.
Em đặt báo thức lúc sáu rưỡi để kịp đi học.

translation.en: It is half past three now.

notes_md:
**rưỡi** means **“half”**, usually added after a number. Most often it means **“and a half”** (like 2.5, 3:30, etc.).

It comes **after a number** to add 0.5 to it. Very common with **time, age, money, and measurements**.


Don’t use it alone — it always follows a number.  
Close cousin: **nửa** = “half,” but used before nouns (nửa giờ = half an hour).
exampleSentencesTranslated: I slept until half past seven in the morning before going to work.
She drinks one and a half liters of water every day to stay healthy.
I set an alarm for half past six to be on time for school.

example.es: Este pastel pesa una y media.
example.vi: Chiếc bánh này nặng một rưỡi.
example.en: This cake weighs one and a half.

definitions.es: Un término utilizado para denotar uno y medio de algo.
definitions.vi: Một thuật ngữ được sử dụng để chỉ một rưỡi của cái gì đó.
definitions.en: A term used to denote one and a half of something.

translation.en: It is half past three now.

notes:
rưỡi means “half”, usually added after a number. Most often it means “and a half” (like 2.5, 3:30, etc.).

It comes after a number to add 0.5 to it. Very common with time, age, money, and measurements.

Don’t use it alone — it always follows a number.  
Close cousin: nửa = “half,” but used before nouns (nửa giờ = half an hour).
